step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing an oversized soft butter-yellow long-sleeve waffle-knit pullover, sleeves pushed up to her elbows, the pullover loose and falling off one shoulder slightly, a thin white camisole strap visible underneath, cream linen drawstring shorts, hair in a messy low bun with face-framing pieces, bare feet. She stands at a modern minimalist kitchen island with a white marble countertop, light wood stools tucked under, soft cream wall behind, a small green plant in a ceramic pot on the counter, a bamboo whisk resting in a ceramic matcha bowl with fresh matcha powder dusted on the bowl edge. Standing three-quarter angle to the camera, one hip leaning against the counter edge, looking softly down at the matcha bowl with a relaxed half-smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her right hand holds the bamboo whisk poised over the matcha bowl. Her left hand rests at hip level against the counter edge, fingers in a relaxed open position, currently empty. Soft morning daylight pours through a window slightly out of frame on the left, warm bone tones across the marble countertop, gentle warm side-light on her left arm. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Slow Saturday morning unhurried mood, palette of butter yellow, white marble, light wood, matcha green, cream. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — three-quarter waist-up framing with face mid-importance, default sufficient alongside the dramatic butter-yellow off-shoulder outfit override which is the primary lock-breaking challenge here.
